acceptance_criteria: 1) TurnDecision logic is fully covered for boundaries (turn=max, turn=max+1). 2) Finalization directive appends correctly without clobbering feedback. 3) Fallback trigger policy matches spec and is tested.
description: Complete turn policy hardening for continue/finalization/fallback transitions, including explicit finalization directive handling and deterministic max-iteration behavior before extraction fallback.
title: V3 slice: harden turn policy and finalization behavior
